title: Every Claude Tool Explained: Master Full Ecosystem in 20 Minutes
summary: Claude now integrates five major products: Chat, Code, Cowork, Design, and Routines. The ecosystem covers research, coding, collaboration, automation, and content creation. Projects, custom instructions, and MCP enable workflow integration across tools.
writeup: The video maps Claude's five integrated products: Chat, Code, Cowork, Design, and Routines, spanning research, coding, collaboration, automation, and content creation. It explains how Projects, custom instructions, and MCP connect these tools into shared workflows. The takeaway is a single-session overview of the full ecosystem and the mechanisms (MCP for integration, custom instructions for steering) that tie the products together.
